name: @gitgecko/plug-retrieve
description: Hybrid retrieval fusion plug for the code-intel owner. Salvaged from continue's NoRerankerRetrievalPipeline (P-codeintel-9): fuses embeddings (50%) + lexical/trigram (25%) + graph expansion (25%) into one ranked, deduplicated result set. Fifth step of Greptile's pipeline — query a codebase.
